rationale: Educ. Code §130.008 governs joint high school and junior college credit courses. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 130.008. COURSES FOR JOINT HIGH SCHOOL AND JUNIOR COLLEGE CREDIT.
_note: The rule text concerns dual-credit course offerings at junior colleges and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
